button.name: PUBLIC
button.label: Publicar
button.descr: Publicar y Activar el Workflow Vigente
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea PUBLICAR esta version?

button.name: ACTIVAR
button.label: Activar
button.descr: Activar todas las Versiones Pausadas del Workflow
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea ACTIVAR esta version y todas sus Instancias?

button.name: PAUSAR
button.label: No Iniciar
button.descr: Activar el Workflow Publicado, no permitiendo iniciar nuevas instancias
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea INHABILITAR la generacion de nuevas Instancias?

button.name: DETENER
button.label: Detener
button.descr: Detener todas las Versiones del Workflow Activas
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea PAUSAR esta version y todas sus Instancias?

button.name: DEBUG
button.label: Depurar
button.descr: Iniciar la Consola en MODO DEPURACION

button.mess: ¿Esta seguro que quiere eliminar "Todas" las instancias de Debug?
button.name: DELDEBUG
button.label: Eliminar Debug

button.name: PUBLICAR
button.label: Publicar
button.descr: Marcar esta version del Workflow como vigente
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea PUBLICAR esta version?

button.name: ACTIVAR
button.label: Activar
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea ACTIVAR esta version y todas sus Intancias?

button.name: DETENER
button.label: Pausar
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea PAUSAR esta version y todas sus Intancias?

button.name: FINALIZAR
button.label: Detener
button.descr: Detener esta version del Workflow y todas sus Instancias
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea DETENER esta version y todas sus Intancias?

button.name: ELIMINAR
button.label: Eliminar
button.descr: Eliminar esta version del Workflow y todas sus Instancias
button.mess: Esta seguro que desea ELIMINAR esta version y todas sus Intancias?

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.WF.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.WF.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_WF.oi_wf) as CNT from WRK01_WF Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_WF.oi_wf={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_WF.d_wf,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_WF.c_wf,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1_AUX
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_wf as oi_wf, T.c_wf as c_wf, T.d_wf as d_wf, T.e_version as e_version, T.e_version_pub as e_version_pub, T.c_text as c_text, T.c_estado as c_estado, T.n_horas as n_horas, T.l_automatica as l_automatica, O.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, O.d_organigrama as d_organigrama FROM WRK01_WF as T, WRK05_ORGANIGRAMAS as O JOIN T.oi_organigrama left outer O.oi_organigrama WHERE T.oi_wf in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: n_horas
qry:attribute.value: iif(floor($r/@n_horas div 24)=0,'',concat(floor($r/@n_horas div 24),' Dias '))+iif(floor($r/@n_horas) mod 24=0,'',concat(floor($r/@n_horas) mod 24,' Horas '))

qry:select.name: sql1_AUX_INST_DBG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.c_wf as c_wf, count(I.oi_instance) as cantDbg FROM WRK01_WF as T, WRK02_INSTANCES as I JOIN T.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf WHERE I.l_debug=1 and T.c_wf in (select X.c_wf from WRK01_WF as X where X.oi_wf in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})) GROUP BY T.c_wf ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1_AUX_INST_OPE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.c_wf as c_wf, count(I.oi_instance) as cantOpe FROM WRK01_WF as T, WRK02_INSTANCES as I JOIN T.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf WHERE I.l_debug=0 and T.c_wf in (select X.c_wf from WRK01_WF as X where X.oi_wf in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})) GROUP BY T.c_wf ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1_AUX_INST_PUB
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_wf as oi_wf, count(I.oi_instance) as cantPub FROM WRK01_WF as T, WRK02_INSTANCES as I JOIN T.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf WHERE I.l_debug=0 and T.oi_wf in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) GROUP BY T.oi_wf ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.c_text as VALUE, WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.c_tipo as TEXT from WRK01_NODE_TEXTS where WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.oi_wf={$PARAM/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_PROCESS.c_process as VALUE, WRK01_PROCESS.d_process as TEXT from WRK01_PROCESS where WRK01_PROCESS.e_automatico=0 and WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf={$PARAM/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

VAR.name: Numero
VAR.label: Numero de Referencia de la Solicitud

VAR.name: Descripcion
VAR.label: Descripcion de la Solicitud

VAR.name: Estado
VAR.label: Estado de la Solicitud

VAR.name: Fecha_Inicio
VAR.label: Fecha de Inicio de la Solicitud

VAR.name: Fecha_Advertencia
VAR.label: Fecha de Advertencia de la Solicitud

VAR.name: Fecha_Vencimiento
VAR.label: Fecha de Vencimiento de la Solicitud

VAR.name: Proxima_a_Vencer
VAR.label: La Solicitud esta Proxima a Vencer?

VAR.name: Vencida
VAR.label: La Solicitud esta Vencida?

VAR.name: ID
VAR.label: ID de Usuario del Solicitante

VAR.name: Nombre
VAR.label: Nombre del Solicitante

VAR.name: Mail
VAR.label: Mail del Solicitante

VAR.name: Telefono
VAR.label: Telefono del Solicitante

VAR.name: Rol
VAR.label: Rol del Solicitante

VAR.name: Fecha_Inicio
VAR.label: Fecha de Inicio del Proceso

VAR.name: Fecha_Advertencia
VAR.label: Fecha de Advertencia del Proceso

VAR.name: Fecha_Vencimiento
VAR.label: Fecha de Vencimiento del Proceso

VAR.name: Proximo_a_Vencer
VAR.label: El Proceso esta Proxima a Vencer?

VAR.name: Vencido
VAR.label: El Proceso esta Vencido?

VAR.name: Fecha_Asignacion
VAR.label: Fecha de Asignacion

VAR.name: ID
VAR.label: ID de la Persona Asignada por Delegacion

VAR.name: Nombre
VAR.label: Nombre de la Persona Asignada por Delegacion

VAR.name: Mail
VAR.label: Mail de la Persona Asignada por Delegacion

VAR.name: Telefono
VAR.label: Telefono de la Persona Asignada por Delegacion

VAR.name: Rol
VAR.label: Rol Asignado por Delegacion

VAR.name: Fecha_Delegacion
VAR.label: Fecha de Delegacion

VAR.name: Comentario
VAR.label: Comentearios del Delegador

VAR.name: ID
VAR.label: ID de la Persona que Delego

VAR.name: Nombre
VAR.label: Nombre de la Persona que Delego

VAR.name: Mail
VAR.label: Mail de la Persona que Delego

VAR.name: Telefono
VAR.label: Telefono de la Persona que Delego

VAR.name: Rol
VAR.label: Rol de la Persona que Delego

VAR.name: ID
VAR.label: ID de Usuario que Resuelve el Formulario

VAR.name: Codigo
VAR.label: Codigo de Usuario que Resuelve el Formulario

VAR.name: Nombre
VAR.label: Nombre del Usuario que Resuelve el Formulario

VAR.name: Mail
VAR.label: Mail del Usuario que Resuelve el Formulario

VAR.name: Telefono
VAR.label: Telefono del Usuario que Resuelve el Formulario

VAR.name: Fecha
VAR.label: Fecha Actual

FUN.name: IsNull
FUN.label: Indica si un valor es NULL

FUN.name: ToBoolean
FUN.label: Convierte un valor a Logico

FUN.name: ToNumber
FUN.label: Convierte un valor a Numero

FUN.name: ToDateTime
FUN.label: Convierte un valor a Fecha/Hora

FUN.name: ToString
FUN.label: Convierte un valor a Texto

FUN.name: Format
FUN.label: Convierte una Fecha a Texto, segun el formato definido.

FUN.name: true
FUN.label: Valor Logico 1

FUN.name: false
FUN.label: Valor Logico 0

FUN.name: Not
FUN.label: Invierte un valor LOGICO

FUN.name: Abs
FUN.label: Valor Absotulo del Numero

FUN.name: Neg
FUN.label: Invierte el signo del Numero

FUN.name: Inv
FUN.label: Invierte el valor del Numero

FUN.name: Ceil
FUN.label: Obtener el Entero proximo superior (redondea hacia el mas alto)

FUN.name: Floor
FUN.label: Obtener el Entero proximo inferior (redondea hacia el mas bajo)

FUN.name: Round
FUN.label: Obtener el Entero mas cercano

FUN.name: Now
FUN.label: Fecha y Hora actual

FUN.name: Date
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor de la Fecha sin la Hora

FUN.name: Time
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor de la Hora sin la Fecha

FUN.name: Year
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor del Ano (4 digitos)

FUN.name: Month
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor del Mes (1 a 12)

FUN.name: Day
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor del Dia del Mes (1 a 31)

FUN.name: WDay
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor del Dia de la Semama (0 a 6)

FUN.name: Hour
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor de la Hora (0 a 23)

FUN.name: Minute
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor de los Minutos (0 a 59)

FUN.name: Second
FUN.label: Obtener el Valor de los Segundos (0 a 59)

FUN.name: Len
FUN.label: Obtener el Largo del Texto

FUN.name: SubStr
FUN.label: Obtener una porcion de Texto, comenzado en inicio y del largo especificado

FUN.name: Left
FUN.label: Obtener una porcion de Texto, comenzado a la Izquierda y del largo especificado

FUN.name: Right
FUN.label: Obtener una porcion de Texto, comenzado a la Derecha y del largo especificado

FUN.name: Normalize
FUN.label: Obtener un Texto Normalizado

FUN.name: UCase
FUN.label: Obtener un Texto en Mayusculas

FUN.name: LCase
FUN.label: Obtener un Texto en Minusculas

FUN.name: Contains
FUN.label: Indica si un Texto a Buscar es contenido en Otro

FUN.name: StartWith
FUN.label: Indica si un Texto a Buscar esta al inicio del Otro

FUN.name: EndWith
FUN.label: Indica si un Texto a Buscar esta al final del Otro

FUN.name: SubStrBefore
FUN.label: Obtener el Texto que esta antes del Texto a Buscar

FUN.name: SubStrAfter
FUN.label: Obtener el Texto que esta despues del Texto a Buscar

FUN.name: PadLeft
FUN.label: Obtener un Texto del largo Especificando Rellenado con caracteres a la Izquierda

FUN.name: PadRight
FUN.label: Obtener un Texto del largo Especificando Rellenado con caracteres a la Derecha

FUN.name: Replace
FUN.label: Obtener un Texto reemplazando el Texto a Buscar por uno Nuevo

FUN.name: SetItemCursor
FUN.label: Establesco la posision del cursor dentro de la Colleccion

FUN.name: GetItemCursor
FUN.label: Obtengo la posision del cursor dentro de la Colleccion

FUN.name: GetLength
FUN.label: Obtengo la cantidad de elementos de la Colleccion

FUN.name: AddItem
FUN.label: Agrego un elemento a la Colleccion, y seteo el cursor en esa posision

FUN.name: DelItem
FUN.label: Elimino el elemento de la Colleccion apuntado por el cursor.

FUN.name: ClearItems
FUN.label: Elimina todos los items de la Colleccion.

FUN.name: if
FUN.label: Ejecuta un procedimiento u otro segun condicion

FUN.name: foreach
FUN.label: Ejecuta un procedimiento iterando entre los item hijos de @variable

FUN.name: for
FUN.label: Ejecuta un procedimiento iterando entre inicio y fin asignado @variable

FUN.name: while
FUN.label: Ejecuta un procedimiento 0 a n veces, mientras condicion sea Verdadera

FUN.name: do
FUN.label: Ejecuta un procedimiento 1 a n veces, mientras condicion sea Verdadera

FUN.name: break
FUN.label: Finaliza un Bucle tipo For/Foreach/While

FUN.name: return
FUN.label: Finaliza un Subproceso, retornando un valor.

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' {%? ($PARAM/@start!='') {% fromrow {%=$PARAM/@start %} %} {% %} %} maxsize 1000 select I.oi_instance, I.c_estado_ej from WRK02_INSTANCES as I where I.oi_wf = {$PARAM/@oi_wf} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select D.oi_wf from WRK01_WF as F, WRK01_WF as D join F.e_version inner D.e_version_pub, F.c_wf inner D.c_wf where F.l_automatica=1 and F.oi_wf = {$PARAM/@oi_wf} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select D.oi_wf from WRK01_WF as F, WRK01_WF as D join F.c_wf inner D.c_wf where D.l_automatica=0 and F.oi_wf = {$PARAM/@oi_wf} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select D.oi_wf, D.c_estado, D.e_version, D.l_automatica from WRK01_WF as F, WRK01_WF as D join F.c_wf inner D.c_wf where F.oi_wf = {$PARAM/@oi_wf} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select P.oi_process, W.oi_wf from WRK01_WF as W, WRK01_PROCESS as P join P.oi_wf inner W.oi_wf where W.l_automatica = 0 and P.e_automatico = 0 and W.c_wf = {$PARAM/@c_wf} and P.c_process = {$PARAM/@c_process} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select P.oi_process, D.oi_wf from WRK01_WF as F, WRK01_WF as D, WRK01_PROCESS as P join F.c_wf inner D.c_wf, F.e_version_pub inner D.e_version, P.oi_wf inner D.oi_wf where F.l_automatica = 0 and P.e_automatico = 0 and F.c_wf = {$PARAM/@c_wf} and P.c_process = {$PARAM/@c_process} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' maxsize 10000 select I.oi_instance from WRK02_INSTANCES as I, WRK01_WF as W, WRK01_WF as Wx join I.oi_wf inner W.oi_wf, W.c_wf inner Wx.c_wf where I.l_debug = 1 and Wx.oi_wf = {$PARAM/@oi_wf} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.FORM.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.FORM.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_FORMS.oi_form) as CNT from WRK01_FORMS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_FORMS.oi_form={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_FORMS.d_form,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_FORMS.c_form,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_FORMS.oi_wf={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_form as oi_form, T.c_form as c_form, T.d_form as d_form, T.d_template as d_template FROM WRK01_FORMS as T WHERE T.oi_form in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.FORM_GROUP.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.FORM_GROUP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_FORM_GROUPS.oi_form_group) as CNT from WRK01_FORM_GROUPS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_FORM_GROUPS.oi_form_group={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_FORM_GROUPS.d_form_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_FORM_GROUPS.c_form_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_FORM_GROUPS.oi_form={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlMain
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT fg.oi_form_group, fg.c_form_group, fg.d_form_group, fg.oi_form, fg.c_order
FROM WRK01_FORM_GROUPS as fg
WHERE fg.oi_form IN ( SELECT fg2.oi_form FROM WRK01_FORM_GROUPS as fg2 WHERE fg2.oi_form_group = {%=#SOURCE:@oi_form_group %} )
ORDER BY c_order {%? (#SOURCE:@direction='UL') {% ASC %} {% DESC %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.FIELD.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.FIELD.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_FORM_FIELDS.oi_field) as CNT from WRK01_FORM_FIELDS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_FORM_FIELDS.oi_field={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_FORM_FIELDS.d_field,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_FORM_FIELDS.c_field,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_FORM_FIELDS.oi_form_group={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlMain
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT ff.oi_field, ff.c_field, ff.d_field, ff.oi_form_group, ff.e_order
FROM WRK01_FORM_FIELDS as ff
WHERE ff.oi_form_group IN ( SELECT ff2.oi_form_group FROM WRK01_FORM_FIELDS as ff2 WHERE ff2.oi_field = {%=#SOURCE:@oi_field %} )
ORDER BY e_order {%? (#SOURCE:@direction='UL') {% ASC %} {% DESC %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.PROCESS.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.PROCESS.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process) as CNT from WRK01_PROCESS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_PROCESS.oi_process={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_PROCESS.d_process,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_PROCESS.c_process,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_PROCESS.oi_wf={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_process as oi_process, T.c_process as c_process, T.d_process as d_process, T.e_automatico as e_automatico FROM WRK01_PROCESS as T WHERE T.oi_process in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.NODE.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.NODE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_NODES.oi_node) as CNT from WRK01_NODES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_NODES.oi_node={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_NODES.d_label,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_NODES.oi_node,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_NODES.oi_process={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT WRK01_NODES.oi_node as ID, WRK01_NODES.oi_node as COD, WRK01_NODES.d_label as DES, WRK01_NODES.c_type as c_type, WRK01_NODES.n_secuence as n_secuence, WRK01_NODES.d_label as d_label, WRK01_NODES.d_param_1 as d_param_1, WRK01_NODES.d_param_2 as d_param_2, WRK01_NODES.d_param_3 as d_param_3, WRK01_NODES.d_param_4 as d_param_4, WRK01_NODES.n_horas as n_horas FROM WRK01_NODES WHERE WRK01_NODES.oi_node in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.PARAM.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.PARAM.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_param) as CNT from WRK01_NODE_PARAMS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_param={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.d_param,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.c_param,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_NODE_PARAMS.oi_node={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

enum-value.label: Puede delegar a un a Persona

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.ROLE_NODE.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.ROLE_NODE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_ROLES_NODE.oi_role_node) as CNT from WRK01_ROLES_NODE Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_ROLES_NODE.oi_role_node={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_ROLES_NODE.c_rol,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_ROLES_NODE.oi_role_node,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_ROLES_NODE.oi_node={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.ROLE_PROCESS.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.ROLE_PROCESS.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_ROLES_PRO.oi_role_process) as CNT from WRK01_ROLES_PRO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_ROLES_PRO.oi_role_process={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_ROLES_PRO.c_rol,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_ROLES_PRO.oi_role_process,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_ROLES_PRO.oi_process={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.PROCESS_PARAM.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.PROCESS_PARAM.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM.oi_process_param) as CNT from WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM.oi_process_param={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM.d_process_param,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM.c_process_param,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM.oi_process={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_process_param as oi_process_param, T.c_process_param as c_process_param, T.d_process_param as d_process_param, T.c_type as c_type, T.c_io as c_io FROM WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM as T WHERE T.oi_process_param in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

enum-value.label: Variables Auxiliares (no se almacen en DB)
Coleccion de Variables Auxiliares (no se guardan en DB)

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.VAR_GROUP.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.VAR_GROUP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_GROUPS.oi_var_group) as CNT from WRK01_GROUPS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_GROUPS.oi_var_group={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_GROUPS.d_var_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_GROUPS.c_var_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_GROUPS.oi_wf={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.VAR_GROUP.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.VAR_GROUP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_GROUPS.oi_var_group) as CNT from WRK01_GROUPS Where WRK01_GROUPS.c_mode IN (\'CHILD\', \'ARRAUX\') {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_GROUPS.oi_var_group={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_GROUPS.d_var_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_GROUPS.c_var_group,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_GROUPS.oi_wf={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_var_group as oi_var_group, T.c_var_group as c_var_group, T.d_var_group as d_var_group, T.c_mode as c_mode FROM WRK01_GROUPS as T WHERE T.oi_var_group in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.VAR.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.VAR.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_VARS.oi_var) as CNT from WRK01_VARS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_VARS.oi_var={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_VARS.d_var,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_VARS.c_var,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_VARS.oi_var_group={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_var as oi_var, T.c_var as c_var, T.d_var as d_var, T.c_type as c_type FROM WRK01_VARS as T WHERE T.oi_var in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK04_INT_MAN.c_int_mag as VALUE, WRK04_INT_MAN.d_int_mag as TEXT from WRK04_INT_MAN where WRK04_INT_MAN.c_list_mode=\'SIMPLE\' ')/ROWS/ROW

NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.VAR_COMBO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_VARS_COMBO.oi_var_combo) as CNT from WRK01_VARS_COMBO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_VARS_COMBO.oi_var_combo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and WRK01_VARS_COMBO.oi_var={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_var_combo as oi_var_combo, T.c_var_combo as c_var_combo, T.d_var_combo as d_var_combo FROM WRK01_VARS_COMBO as T WHERE T.oi_var_combo in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.TEXT.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.oi_text) as CNT from WRK01_NODE_TEXTS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.oi_text={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.c_text,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(WRK01_NODE_TEXTS.c_text,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_text as oi_text, T.c_text as c_text, T.c_tipo as c_tipo FROM WRK01_NODE_TEXTS as T WHERE T.oi_text in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.ESTADO.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT WRK01_ESTADOS.oi_estado as ID, WRK01_ESTADOS.c_estado as COD, WRK01_ESTADOS.d_estado as DES, WRK01_ESTADOS.c_estado as c_estado, WRK01_ESTADOS.d_estado as d_estado, WRK01_ESTADOS.c_color as c_color, WRK01_ESTADOS.n_horas_delete as n_horas_delete, WRK01_ESTADOS.l_pause as l_pause, WRK01_ESTADOS.l_stop as l_stop, WRK01_ESTADOS.l_delete as l_delete FROM WRK01_ESTADOS WHERE WRK01_ESTADOS.oi_estado in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
